items.title: NIOS Delhi / NCR — Admission open for academic session 2024-25
items.summary: Online admission guidance for Delhi NCR learners via NIOS Regional Centre Delhi (Sector-62, Noida).

items.title: Notification 44/2021 dt. 15/03/2021 — Extension of Stream-1 Block-2 2020-21 admission
items.summary: Extension notice for NIOS Stream-1 Block-2 admission (relevant for Delhi learners applying via SDMIS).

items.title: Notification 7/2020 dt. 25/09/2020 — Last date for admission (OBE, Vocational Block-1, Stream-2)
items.summary: Last dates for Open Basic Education, vocational courses, and Stream-2 admission for session 2020-21.

items.title: Notification 01/2022 dt. 07 Jan 2022 — TMA upload/download on SDMIS student portal
items.summary: Secondary and Senior Secondary TMAs can be downloaded and uploaded via https://sdmis.nios.ac.in

items.title: Notification-34/2024 dt. 09/07/2024 — Registration of exam centres for NIOS Oct-2024 public examination
items.summary: Registration of examination centres for NIOS October 2024 public exams (Delhi / NCR learners).

items.title: Circular-01/2024 dt. 25/04/2024 — Old and new syllabus for five Sr. Secondary subjects
items.summary: Syllabus update circular for Class 12 (Senior Secondary) NIOS subjects.

items.title: Notification 48/2021 dt. 21/12/2021 — Examination fee for Secondary & Sr. Secondary April/May 2022
items.summary: Examination fee notification for Class 10 and 12 NIOS board exams.

items.title: Order on equivalency of NIOS Class X and XII certificates for public employment
items.summary: Government order regarding recognition of NIOS Secondary and Senior Secondary certificates.
